HEALTH STUDIES ELECTIVES (35 Credits, 10 must be 8 HLTH)
UPPER DIVISION GENERAL ELECTIVES (15 Credits, 300-400 Level; any courses from UW)
*BHS 496 can be taken concurrently with BHS 403; need senior standing
D WRITING ACROSS THE CURRICULUM (10 CREDITS)
(minimum of 180 college-level credits required for graduation)
(minimum of 45 UW credits required for graduation)
Special Topics courses are typically limited to 10-15 credits per course number; please check with your advisor for specific restrictions on these courses
